top_signals.title: Meta used AI to target workers with medical conditions for layoffs, lawsuit claims
top_signals.summary: The lawsuit ​says that the company relied on factors such as productivity and AI token usage when it slashed thousands of jobs earlier this year.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
